zh.lifeSummary: 當George Inkerstall於1562年11月出生在英國貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德時，他的父親Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll25歲，母親Cecily Grante21歲。他於1584年6月21日與Alicia Hankin在英國英格蘭賀特福爾辛沃斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1644年7月21日在英國貝德福爾艾德沃斯享年81歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾艾德沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Inkerstall于1562年11月出生在英国貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德时，他的父亲Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll25岁，母亲Cecily Grante21岁。他于1584年6月21日与Alicia Hankin在英国英格兰賀特福爾辛沃斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1644年7月21日在英国貝德福爾艾德沃斯享年81岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾艾德沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When George Inkerstall was born in November 1562, in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll, was 25 and his mother, Cecily Grante, was 21. He married Alicia Hankin on 21 June 1584, in Hinxworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 July 1644, in Edworth, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Edworth, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Inkerstall est né en novembre 1562, à Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Cecily Grante, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alicia Hankin le 21 juin 1584, à Hinxworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1644, à Edworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Edworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

Er hat am 21. Juni 1584 in Hinxworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alicia Hankin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. it.lifeSummary: Quando George Inkerstall è nato il nel novembre 1562 nel Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Grante, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Alicia Hankin il 21 giugno 1584, nel Hinxworth, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 luglio 1644, nel Edworth, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Edworth, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: George Inkerstallが1562年11月にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアビググレスワドで生まれた時，父Robert Geoffrey Ingorsollは25歳，母Cecily Granteは21歳であった。1584年6月21日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアヒンクスウオルスでAlicia Hankinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1644年7月21日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアエドウオルスで81歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアエドウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘
ko.lifeSummary: George Inkerstall(이)가 1562년 11월 영국 베드퍼드실르 비글레스웨이드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Grante(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1584년 6월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 이스워스에서 Alicia Hankin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1644년 7월 21일 영국 베드퍼드실르 에드워스에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 에드워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Inkerstall nasceu em novembro de 1562, em Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Grante, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Alicia Hankin em 21 de junho de 1584, em Hinxworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1644, em Edworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Edworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Inkerstall родился ноябрь 1562 г. в местности биглесвад, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Grante, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia Hankin 21 июня 1584 г. в местности хинксворт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 июля 1644 г. в местности эдворт, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности эдворт, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Inkerstall nació en noviembre de 1562, en Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Cecily Grante, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Alicia Hankin el 21 de junio de 1584, en Hinxworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de julio de 1644, en Edworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Edworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
